title: Mo'Disks
description: This mod adds new music disks composed by my friend Br103 and a way to craft those (using plants)
body:
This mod is deprecated and is need for a rewrite so im doing it.
Released in CurseForge in mid 2022, recovered in 4/13/2024 along with some other mods.

Introducing Mo'disks: an immersive Minecraft mod featuring original music tracks by AKDavid. Experience enchanting melodies with "Sunday," "Medley," "Following the Stars" and more coming soon. Elevate your gameplay with captivating tunes. Unleash the power of Mo'disks and embark on a musical adventure.

Those songs have not released anywhere else.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34bfc4f2406b0c6a4e30e222dfed852e7045aa94.png)
Br103 (AKDavid) providing me (Doom Arnetes) permission for song use.
